description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with a combination of flat and gable roofs, surrounded by lush landscaping and mature trees. The exterior is finished in a mix of light and dark tones, with large windows providing ample natural light and visual connection to the outdoors. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage, a manicured lawn, and privacy hedges along the perimeter. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a patio area, ideal for outdoor living. The structure appears to have two main stories, with a prominent central section and side wings. The overall layout is open and inviting, blending contemporary elements with suburban comfort.
description: A modern two-story house with flat and gable roofs, large windows, and landscaped surroundings, featuring a driveway, garage, and spacious backyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage entrance, main entryway, and dense landscaping with trees and hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, large windows, and the expansive backyard with patio and privacy hedges.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, multiple stories, and a mix of window sizes with lush greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, additional trees, and the side profile of the house with its rooflines.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and mixed sizes
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, single front door, and adjacent garage, framed by landscaping and a paved driveway.
